Subject: Summer is heating up at Ameritrade
Message:
Dear James Schwieger,
Summer is heating up and so is Ameritrade!  Check
out our new paperless delivery service, complete
your Exchange Agreements, and get some ideas about 
how to tackle that future college expense!
GO PAPERLESS AND SAVE.
Receive an e-mail notification of when your
statement or the day's trade confirmations are
available online.  This service is fast,
convenient and FREE.  Simply log on to your
account, go to the myAccount or Account Services
tab to subscribe.  http://www.ameritrade.com Don't delay, as previously communicated, effective
July 1, 2001, a $2 fee will be assessed for each
trade confirmation sent to you via U.S. Mail.
DON'T LOSE YOUR REAL-TIME QUOTES!
To receive real-time quotes, the Exchanges require
that you complete the Exchange Agreements.  If you
have not completed these agreements, you will
begin receiving delayed quotes on May 31, 2001. 
To ensure that you continue to receive unlimited
real-time quotes, just log on to your account, go
to the Account Services tab and then, under
Forms/Deposit Slip, click on the Exchange
Agreements link.http://www.ameritrade.com SAVING FOR THEIR FUTURE
